titleStmt.title: SII 19.116: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 116. (A.R. No. 76 of 1931.) TIRUPPŪNDURUTTI, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, PUSHPAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 96 sheep made by Piśaṅgaṉ Koṟṟaṉ Ārkkāṭṭuvēḷāṉ a resident of Nānāndur in Ārkkāṭṭu-kūṟṟam, to the temple of Mahādēva at Tirutturutti, for burning a perpetual lamp in the shrine of the goddess and for worship during a service therein called the śānti-viḻā. The sabhā of Tirutturutti made themselves responsible for the maintenance of this service by collecting 7 nāḻi and an uri of ghee every month from two shepherds with whom the sheep were left.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu Āṟkkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu teva
tāṉam tirutturutti mahādevarkku Ikkūṟṟattu nānāntūr nānāntū
ruṭaiyān picaṅkaṉ koṟṟaṉ na tevaṉ Ārkkāṭṭuveḷāṉ Oru
nontāviḷakkiṟkku vaicca Āṭu 96 Āṭuñ cāvāmuvāpperāṭāka Eriyū
rnaāṭṭuk kaḷakkuṭi maṉṟāṭi kaṇiccaṉ teṟṟi Ivūr maṉṟāṭiy turutti centaṉai
puṇaiyākak kuṭuttu Ivvāṇṭu paṅkuṉi mutalāka koṇṭu tiṅkaḷ Eḻu nā
ḻi Uri neyyum pirāṭṭiyār cāntiviḻāvukku mūṭṭi Iraṇṭu ku
ṉṉum cantirātittaval neyyum kaṭā ṭaṉum Iṭuvomāno
m kaṇiccaṉ teṟṟiyum Ivaṉukkup puṉaippaṭṭa turutti centaṉum I
vviruvaraiyum tiṅkaḷtoṟum taṇṭi Aṭṭuviccu tiruviḷakku Erippippomā
nom tirutturutti sabhaiyom Itu paṉmāyeśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.116 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
